languages.text: {n}Нунциус послушно включает встроенный {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}люмен{/g}, освещая оперируемых. Кажется, он не готов раскрывать тонкости эксперимента, молча уступая право ответа Эоганну.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Нунциус послушно включает встроенный {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}люмен{/g}, освещая оперируемых. Кажется, он не готов раскрывать тонкости эксперимента, молча уступая право ответа Эо-ганну.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius obediently turns on his built-in {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g}, illuminating the subjects on the tables. It seems he is unwilling to divulge the subtleties of the experiment, silently ceding the right to answer to Eogunn.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Нунциус послушно включает встроенный {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}люмен{/g}, освещая оперируемых. Кажется, он не готов раскрывать тонкости эксперимента, молча уступая право ответа Эоганну.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヌンシウスは従順に内蔵された{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}ルミナス{/g}を点灯させ、テーブルの上の被験体を照らした。実験の微妙な点を明かすことは望まないようだが、黙ってエオグンに答える権利を譲っているようである。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius obediently turns on his built-in {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g}, illuminating the subjects on the tables. It seems he is unwilling to divulge the subtleties of the experiment, silently ceding the right to answer to Eogunn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ヌンシウスは従順に内蔵されたルミナスを点灯させ、テーブルの上の被験体を照らした。実験の微妙な点を明かすことは望まないようだが、黙ってエオグンに答える権利を譲っているようである。
{n}ヌンシウスは従順に内蔵された{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}ルミナス{/g}を点灯させ、テーブルの上の被験体を照らした。実験の微妙な点を明かすことは望まないようだが、黙ってエオグンに答える権利を譲っているようである。{/n}

languages.text: {n}努恩修斯顺从地打开了他的内置{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}光源{/g}，照亮了手术台上的实验体。他似乎不愿透露实验的奥秘，沉默地将回答的权利让给了伊奥贡。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius obediently turns on his built-in {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g}, illuminating the subjects on the tables. It seems he is unwilling to divulge the subtleties of the experiment, silently ceding the right to answer to Eogunn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}努恩修斯顺从地打开了他的内置{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}光源{/g}，照亮了手术台上的实验体。他似乎不愿透露实验的奥秘，沉默地将回答的权利让给了伊奥贡。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius activa obedientemente su {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g} incorporado para iluminar a los sujetos de las mesas. Parece poco dispuesto a compartir las sutilezas del experimento y cede discretamente la palabra a Eogunn.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius obediently turns on his built-in {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g}, illuminating the subjects on the tables. It seems he is unwilling to divulge the subtleties of the experiment, silently ceding the right to answer to Eogunn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius activa obedientemente su {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g} incorporado para iluminar a los sujetos de las mesas. Parece poco dispuesto a compartir las sutilezas del experimento y cede discretamente la palabra a Eogunn.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius richtet gehorsam sein eingebautes {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumen{/g} auf die Subjekte auf den Tischen. Er scheint nicht bereit zu sein, auf die Einzelheiten des Experiments einzugehen und überlässt die Antwort schweigend Eogunn.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius obediently turns on his built-in {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g}, illuminating the subjects on the tables. It seems he is unwilling to divulge the subtleties of the experiment, silently ceding the right to answer to Eogunn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius richtet gehorsam sein eingebautes {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumen{/g} auf die Subjekte auf den Tischen. Er scheint nicht bereit zu sein, auf die Einzelheiten des Experiments einzugehen und überlässt die Antwort schweigend Eogunn.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius allume docilement son {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g} intégré pour éclairer les sujets allongés sur les tables. Cependant, il ne semble pas vouloir divulguer les subtilités de l'expérience et cède silencieusement ce droit à Eogunn.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius obediently turns on his built-in {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g}, illuminating the subjects on the tables. It seems he is unwilling to divulge the subtleties of the experiment, silently ceding the right to answer to Eogunn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius allume docilement son {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g} intégré pour éclairer les sujets allongés sur les tables. Cependant, il ne semble pas vouloir divulguer les subtilités de l'expérience et cède silencieusement ce droit à Eogunn.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nuncius, itaatkâr bir şekilde yerleşik {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lümenini{/g} açarak masalardaki denekleri aydınlatıyor. Görünüşe göre deneyin inceliklerini açığa vurmak istemiyor, cevap verme hakkını sessizce Eogunn'a bırakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius obediently turns on his built-in {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumen{/g}, illuminating the subjects on the tables. It seems he is unwilling to divulge the subtleties of the experiment, silently ceding the right to answer to Eogunn.{/n}
